name: airtable-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Airtable CRUD, search, views, and schema access.

list.description: List all records in the Airtable table.

get.description: Retrieve a single record by ID.

body.fields: Object of Airtable fields to create.
Object of Airtable fields to update.

delete.description: Delete an Airtable record by ID.

search.description: Search Airtable records by field and value.

view.description: List records from a specific Airtable view.
